payload.text:
**Defining the Healthcare Chatbot**

I'm currently focused on defining the core requirements of this healthcare chatbot. My initial thoughts center on the tech stack: React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. The Gemini API will power its AI capabilities. Key features under consideration include a chat interface and specific instructions for the healthcare domain.


**Refining the Chatbot's Functionality**

I'm now zeroing in on the specific functionalities. The priority is a robust symptom checker and health advice component, driven by Gemini 3 Pro/Flash. I'm also planning to integrate Gemini via its API, potentially with streaming. I'm prioritizing a responsive and high-quality UI/UX built with Tailwind. Data visualization is on the radar, depending on the structure of the health data returned by the model; Recharts seems promising here. A voice interaction option is also intriguing, possibly as a premium feature using the Live API. Safety disclaimers are crucial, of course.


**Implementing the UI and API**

My focus is now on implementing the UI with Tailwind and integrating the Gemini API. I'm leveraging 'gemini-3-pro-preview' for robust reasoning and the googleSearch tool to keep the answers up-to-date. I'm using a clean, medical-themed palette, avatar, and sidebar for the chatbot. I've also identified key files like `App.tsx`, `components/ChatContainer.tsx`, and `geminiService.ts`. I also need to ensure that the persistent safety disclaimer is visible and I'm using metadata.json for basic information.


**Integrating New Features**

I'm now focusing on integrating new features. I'm ensuring I'm using `@google/genai` correctly and avoiding legacy `ReactDOM.render`. I'm building "Actionable Steps" as a feature and incorporating `recharts` to display mock "Wellness Trends" based on chat topics. I plan to display URLs if I use Google Search grounding.

entries.description: App metadata and configuration including microphone permissions for potential voice features.
Main HTML entry point with Tailwind CSS support.
React entry point using modern createRoot API.
Service layer for Gemini API interaction, including Google Search grounding and streaming.
Main application component with layout and state management.

payload.text: give some common text about the health issue to get the information from the user

**Considering UI Improvements**

I'm focusing on UI enhancements now, specifically how to help users share vital health information. I'm exploring adding buttons for common health issues and suggested prompts within the chat interface. This will give users quick-start options to begin the conversation, ensuring they can provide important details with ease.

entries.description: Added a "Suggested Topics" section to the chat interface to help users start conversations about common health issues. Included a grid of pill-shaped suggestion buttons and a handler for clicking them.
